The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, and its health benefits include the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory problems, as well as its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The bioactive constituents of Chuppalonia acuminata include alkaloids, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
